name: io.github.hypeprinter007-stack/anchor-x402
description: 14-tool x402-paid MCP server on Base + Solana mainnet — 9 commodity primitives (anchor, screen, attest, decode/tx, resolve/name, price/token, decode/calldata, parse/datetime, intel/wallet) plus 5 universal LLM endpoints (roast, oracle, tldr, aura, grade). Pay-per-call USDC, no API keys.

environmentVariables.name: ANCHOR_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: EVM private key (0x-prefixed hex). The wallet pays for x402 calls in USDC on Base mainnet. Fund with USDC before use.
